title: helichrysum italicum subsp. serotinum
intro: Helichrysum italicum subsp. serotinum, also known as Italian strawflower or yellow mountain cornflower, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum italicum subsp. serotinum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting skin health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and natural skincare products. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its therapeutic benefits.
